_comment: This file is READ AT RUNTIME. The AI can modify this to improve itself WITHOUT rebuilding.

query_to_tool_mappings._description: Maps query patterns to preferred tools. AI learns these over time.

light_modifications.notes: Thin wrapper set_light_properties was removed. Prefer set_actor_property or set_component_property for explicit light edits, and use get_level_actors when the target light is ambiguous. Supports percentages like '200%'.

argument_extraction._description: Patterns to extract arguments from natural language

clarification_triggers._description: When to ask user for clarification instead of guessing

ambiguous_actor.ask: I found multiple actors matching '{query}': {matches}. Which one did you mean?

no_target.ask: There are no {type} actors in the scene. Should I create one?

unclear_intent.ask: I'm not sure what you want. Did you mean to {guess1} or {guess2}?

learning_log._description: Record of AI self-corrections. AI appends here when it learns.
